title: Lively Craft
description: Lively Craft is a lightweight modpack that improves Minecraft with smoother gameplay, better performance, and subtle visual enhancements
body:
## 📦 Lively Craft
**Lively Craft** is a **lightweight**, **performance-friendly** modpack designed to refresh Minecraft without changing its core identity. It focuses on **smoother gameplay**, **improved visuals**, and **quality-of-life enhancements** that make the world feel more alive while keeping a **true vanilla** atmosphere.

## ✨ Main Features

- **FPS & Performance Improvements**
  Faster **chunk loading**, optimized **rendering**, reduced **stutters**, and better **performance** on both low-end and high-end PCs.

- **Enhanced Visuals (Still Vanilla-Friendly)**
  Subtle **lighting upgrades**, cleaner **textures**, improved **foliage**, **connected glass**, and better **particles** — all without losing the classic Minecraft feel.

- **Quality-of-Life Tweaks**
  Small improvements like better **item tooltips**, improved **UI clarity**, more useful **F3 info**, and smoother **animations**.

- **Stable & Lightweight**
  Carefully selected **lightweight mods** to keep the experience **fast**, **stable**, and **beginner-friendly**.

## 🎮 What Makes It Special?
Lively Craft doesn’t try to **overhaul** Minecraft completely. Instead, it focuses on polishing the **vanilla experience** — smoother, prettier, and more comfortable to play, while staying close to the original game’s style.

Perfect for **survival players** who want their world to feel more **vibrant** without installing heavy or game-changing mods.

![Ruined Portal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2d3e0605b4ef438b59437aedf6e9397fdfe527d0.png)
